# VIONIS·XY — Full Brand & Product Guide

> Handcrafted luxury knitwear from the finest natural fibres. Premium cashmere and merino wool.

## About VIONIS·XY

VIONIS·XY creates handcrafted luxury knitwear using rare cashmere and seamless merino wool. The brand is built on three pillars: exceptional materials, artisan craftsmanship, and sustainable practices.

### Materials

- **Cashmere**: Sourced from the finest herds; each fibre is hand-selected for softness, durability, and warmth. VIONIS·XY uses only Grade-A cashmere with a fibre diameter under 15.5 microns.
- **Merino Wool**: 100% extra-fine merino wool, chosen for its natural breathability, moisture-wicking properties, and ultra-soft hand feel. Seamless knitting technology eliminates seams for maximum comfort.

### Craftsmanship

Every VIONIS·XY garment is produced in small batches using traditional hand-knitting and whole-garment knitting techniques. This approach ensures each piece meets exacting quality standards while minimising waste.

### Sustainability

- Ethical sourcing with full supply-chain traceability
- Small-batch production to reduce overstock waste
- Natural, biodegradable fibres
- Minimal-packaging philosophy

## Product Collections

### Cashmere Collection
Premium cashmere garments including sweaters, cardigans, wraps, scarves, and accessories. Known for an incredibly soft hand feel and lightweight warmth.
- URL: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/cashmere

### Merino Collection
Seamless merino wool knitwear designed for everyday luxury. Features whole-garment construction for a smooth, comfortable fit.
- URL: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/merino

### New Arrivals
The latest seasonal releases across all product lines.
- URL: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/new-arrivals

### Gifts
Curated gift sets and selections for special occasions.
- URL: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/gifts

## Languages & Currencies

Available in 14 languages: English (en), French (fr), German (de), Japanese (ja), Italian (it), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), Dutch (nl), Polish (pl), Czech (cs), Danish (da), Finnish (fi), Norwegian (no), Swedish (sv).

Supported currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD, CHF, SEK, NOK, DKK, PLN, CZK, SGD, HKD, NZD, MYR, AED, ILS.
